parts.text:
Create a detailed day-by-day travel itinerary for a trip to bengaluru for 5 days.
The traveler is starting from hyderabad.
The traveler's budget is ₹7500 INR.
Their interests include Nature, Food, Adventure, Nightlife.
They are traveling solo.
Travel starts on 2026-04-30.

You MUST respond with ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no code fences. Use this exact structure:
{
  "destination": "bengaluru",
  "summary": "A brief 1-2 sentence summary of the trip",
  "estimated_total": "₹XXXXX",
  "budget_breakdown": {
    "accommodation": "₹XXXXX",
    "food": "₹XXXXX",
    "transport": "₹XXXXX",
    "activities": "₹XXXXX"
  },
  "days": [
    {
      "day": 1,
      "title": "Theme of the day",
      "weather": {
        "temperature": "XX°C",
        "condition": "Sunny/Cloudy/Rainy/etc",
        "icon": "☀️/⛅/🌧️/etc"
      },
      "activities": [
        {
          "time": "10:00 AM",
          "title": "Activity name",
          "description": "Brief description",
          "cost": "₹XXX or Free",
          "type": "attraction"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

Important rules:
- All costs must be in Indian Rupees (₹)
- Include 4-6 activities per day (type can be "attraction", "food", "transport", or "hotel")
- Each day should have a hotel check-in as the last activity (except the last day)
- ONLY return valid JSON (do not include ```json blocks at the beginning or end).
